messages.content: transfer to english: 請教Ralph, May姐,跟IT, 學會用SAP建立SO, 學會用upload system 去建立新so,令建立新so時間快了, 學會看out of stock item, 學會公司品牌建立新so, 足夠$2000才可以送貨, GRN跟SO同一天先可以節省SCM時間, 可以同一天收貨及送貨

Please ask Ralph, May sister, and IT to learn how to establish a Sales Order using SAP, learn how to create a new SO using the upload system to expedite the process, learn how to identify out of stock items, learn how to establish a new SO under the company's brand, ensure that the order is worth at least $2000 for delivery, and understand that receiving goods (GRN) and delivering them can be done on the same day to save time in the Supply Chain Management process.
transfer to english: 學會用onecx建立IU, GWP,Sample, paperstand
Learn how to create IU, GWP (Gift With Purchase), Sample, and paperstand using Onecx.
transfer to english: using GRN summary 得知未完成的GRN, 已收的退貨有防盜/爛貨/過期, 學會知會SCM how to handle, 令退貨可以加快處理

Using GRN (Goods Receipt Note) summary, identify any pending GRNs and note any returns that have been received, including theft, damaged goods, and expired products. Learn how to inform the Supply Chain Management department on how to handle these returns in order to expedite the processing.
transfer to english: using GRN summary 得知未完成的GRN, 如已收的退貨有防盜/爛貨/過期, 知會SCM how to handle, 令退貨可以加快處理

Using the GRN (Goods Receipt Note) summary, identify any pending GRNs and communicate to the Supply Chain Management department how to handle returns that have already been received, including cases of theft, damaged goods, and expired items. This will help expedite the processing of returns.
transfer in english: 知道一個星期會收到那幾間j-retailers PO, 可以主動問salesmen send out PO, 學會用sap check SO approve.
Know which j-retailers' purchase orders (POs) will be received within a week, and proactively ask the salesmen to send out the POs. Learn how to use SAP to check and approve sales orders (SOs).
transfer in english:學會Order Credit Status report做summary一次過通知salesmen 已建立SO, 跟有那些OOS item.
Learn how to generate an Order Credit Status report to provide a summary notification to the salesmen about the created sales orders (SOs) and which out-of-stock (OOS) items are included.
transfer in english: Stock take時期,  通知salesman delivery date, 安排最快送貨日期, 如果真係好urgent同SCM溝通可以盡快送貨

During the stock take period, notify the salesman of the delivery date and arrange the earliest possible delivery date. If it is truly urgent, communicate with SCM (Supply Chain Management) to expedite the delivery.
transfer in english: 準時Upload HKTVMall pick list,  準時通知FIN approve SO, 令SCM 可以準時備貨
Upload the HKTVMall pick list on time and notify FIN (Finance department) to approve the sales orders (SOs) promptly, ensuring that SCM (Supply Chain Management) can prepare the goods on time.
transfer in english:建立Product code + mapping可以 fulfill j-retailers PO, 不會有太多OOS
Create a product code mapping system that can fulfill the purchase orders (POs) from j-retailers, aiming to minimize the occurrence of out-of-stock (OOS) items.
transfer in english:建立Product code + mapping可以 fulfill j-retailers PO, 減少OOS情況
Establish a product code mapping system to fulfill the purchase orders (POs) from j-retailers and reduce the occurrence of out-of-stock (OOS) situations.
transfer in english: Update item master, 令item master 有update information, update onecx material master 可以出IU單
Update the item master to ensure that it has the most updated information. Update the Onecx material master accordingly so that it can generate the IU (Internal Use) forms.
transfer in english:Update the item master to ensure information 是最新的. Update the Onecx material master accordingly so that it can generate the IU
Update the item master to ensure that the information is up to date. Make corresponding updates to the Onecx material master so that it can generate the IU (Internal Use) forms.
transfer in english:建立so時明白哪款產品訂單較多,  容易oos
When creating sales orders, understand which products have higher order quantities and are more prone to experiencing out-of-stock (OOS) situations.
transfer in english:上網跟逛街留意,知道AN有mid milk, mid gel 的防晒, ETS有gel eyeliner, MASCARA pdt, DPR for 敏弱肌, elixir for 抗皺

Pay attention when browsing online or shopping to become aware that AN offers mid milk and mid gel sunscreens, ETS has gel eyeliner and mascara products, DPR caters to sensitive skin, and elixir products are available for anti-aging purposes.
transfer in english:銷售商的新鋪
The retailer's new store.
transfer in english: 當SCM 回覆 Return order amendment – discrepancy之後 Handling應該怎樣做, write off, GRN,  stock take cut off做法都不一樣

Once SCM responds to the Return Order Amendment - Discrepancy, the handling process may differ depending on the specific situation. When it comes to write-offs, Goods Receipt Note (GRN), and stock take cut-off, the approach may vary.
